note: The ONE per-step friction vocabulary for usability sessions (the usability-session artifact). An ordered severity scale (0 none … 3 blocked) mirroring stance_scale.json; resolved via artifacts.resolve_friction(). `aliases` map free/legacy tokens (incl. EN/DE display words) onto a canonical level — add an alias, no code change; lookup is case/whitespace-insensitive. Unlike stances, an UNKNOWN level is rejected on record instead of bucketed: silently downgrading a 'blocked' read to 'none' would corrupt the session funnel.
